item.title: Quick and Dirty Vehicle Recovery
item.description: A straightforward recovery operation focuses on getting a stranded vehicle back on the road as quickly as possible. Can the team make it look easy?

media:content.media:title: Quick and Dirty Vehicle Recovery
media:content.media:description: A straightforward recovery operation focuses on getting a stranded vehicle back on the road as quickly as possible. Can the team make it look easy?

item.title: Moving a Giant Spherical Tank at Midnight
item.description: A massive spherical tank is carefully transported during a late-night operation requiring planning, coordination, and precision. How do crews move cargo this unusual?

media:content.media:title: Moving a Giant Spherical Tank at Midnight
media:content.media:description: A massive spherical tank is carefully transported during a late-night operation requiring planning, coordination, and precision. How do crews move cargo this unusual?

item.title: Van Stuck in the Mud
item.description: A vehicle recovery gets underway after a van becomes trapped in deep mud and loses traction. What will it take to get it moving again?

media:content.media:title: Van Stuck in the Mud
media:content.media:description: A vehicle recovery gets underway after a van becomes trapped in deep mud and loses traction. What will it take to get it moving again?

item.title: Successfully Towed a Burnt Combine
item.description: A fire-damaged combine is successfully recovered and transported despite the challenges posed by its condition and size. What strategy made this difficult tow possible?

media:content.media:title: Successfully Towed a Burnt Combine
media:content.media:description: A fire-damaged combine is successfully recovered and transported despite the challenges posed by its condition and size. What strategy made this difficult tow possible?

item.title: Hooking Up a Heavy Duty Semi Truck
item.description: A heavy-duty semi truck is being hooked up for recovery, showing the towing process and equipment involved in the operation. A straightforward look at real-world roadside recovery, isn’t it?

media:content.media:title: Hooking Up a Heavy Duty Semi Truck
media:content.media:description: A heavy-duty semi truck is being hooked up for recovery, showing the towing process and equipment involved in the operation. A straightforward look at real-world roadside recovery, isn’t it?

item.title: Heavy Recovery and Towing Operations
item.description: A look at heavy recovery and towing operations in the field, with the focus on the process and equipment used during vehicle rescue and roadside recovery. What happens next?

media:content.media:title: Heavy Recovery and Towing Operations
media:content.media:description: A look at heavy recovery and towing operations in the field, with the focus on the process and equipment used during vehicle rescue and roadside recovery. What happens next?

item.title: How To Tow a Burnt Combine
item.description: A look at the recovery process for towing a burnt combine, with attention to the equipment and field operations involved. What tools and steps are used to move it safely?

media:content.media:title: How To Tow a Burnt Combine
media:content.media:description: A look at the recovery process for towing a burnt combine, with attention to the equipment and field operations involved. What tools and steps are used to move it safely?

item.title: When a Semi-Truck Flips on the Job
item.description: A semi-truck rollover calls for careful recovery work, the right equipment, and a steady process to get the vehicle secured and moved. This video focuses on the real-world steps involved in heavy

media:content.media:title: When a Semi-Truck Flips on the Job
media:content.media:description: A semi-truck rollover calls for careful recovery work, the right equipment, and a steady process to get the vehicle secured and moved. This video focuses on the real-world steps involved in heavy

item.title: This Recovery Plan Should Work
item.description: A heavy recovery operation built around a clear plan, the right equipment, and careful execution. The focus is on towing and vehicle rescue in a real-world field setting. What would you use first?

media:content.media:title: This Recovery Plan Should Work
media:content.media:description: A heavy recovery operation built around a clear plan, the right equipment, and careful execution. The focus is on towing and vehicle rescue in a real-world field setting. What would you use first?

item.title: Here We Tow Again
item.description: A straightforward towing and recovery operation focused on getting a vehicle moved safely with the right equipment and process. What would you like to see next?

media:content.media:title: Here We Tow Again
media:content.media:description: A straightforward towing and recovery operation focused on getting a vehicle moved safely with the right equipment and process. What would you like to see next?

item.title: This Should Work
item.description: A real-time recovery situation where a plan is put into motion to resolve a roadside issue. The video follows steps, coordination, and execution. What do you think is the hardest part of recovery work?

media:content.media:title: This Should Work
media:content.media:description: A real-time recovery situation where a plan is put into motion to resolve a roadside issue. The video follows steps, coordination, and execution. What do you think is the hardest part of recovery work?

item.title: Midnight in the Median
item.description: A nighttime recovery operation taking place in the highway median under low visibility conditions. The video highlights focus, lighting, and coordination. How different do you think night recoveries are compared to daytime work?

media:content.media:title: Midnight in the Median
media:content.media:description: A nighttime recovery operation taking place in the highway median under low visibility conditions. The video highlights focus, lighting, and coordination. How different do you think night recoveries are compared to daytime work?

item.title: Not Much to Be Honest
item.description: A simple roadside recovery job where the situation is handled efficiently with practical problem-solving. The video shows steady progress and teamwork. What makes some jobs go smoother than others?

media:content.media:title: Not Much to Be Honest
media:content.media:description: A simple roadside recovery job where the situation is handled efficiently with practical problem-solving. The video shows steady progress and teamwork. What makes some jobs go smoother than others?
